blocks.text: Carlsen enters the ring — Candidates Tournament kicks off Wednesday
Tomorrow at 16:00, Magnus Carlsen opens his bid for the FIDE Candidates title — the only tournament that earns the right to challenge the World Chess Champion. The hardest road in chess starts now.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen launches FIDE Candidates bid, Round 1
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Real Madrid at Mallorca, leaders need three points
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters opens, clay season begins
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest, rain storms into the biggest event of 2026
